documents.rawText:
# Auto-generated by CORNERSTONE PDK Monitor v1.0.0
# Edit freely — this file is a starting point, not authoritative.

name: SOI220nm_1550nm_TM_STRIP_focusing_GC_apodised
description: ""
bb_type: "grating-coupler"
category: passive
platform: SOI 220 nm Passive
status: progress
owner: "https://github.com/AEmreKaplan/"
updated: "2026-05-26"
gds_file: components/SOI220_cband_TM_strip_apodized_GC_focusing_v1p0.gds

layers:

    datatype: undefined

parameters:
  period_nm: 630
  n_periods: 28
  fill_factor: 0.5

  thickness_nm: 220

eda_tools:

externalized.note: Per-BB folder layout: users/https-github.com-AEmreKaplan-/<bb>/PDKMonitor_<section>/<file> — section folders prefixed with PDKMonitor_ so it's clear which dirs this dashboard wrote (PDKMonitor_components, PDKMonitor_sparams, PDKMonitor_characterisation, PDKMonitor_fabrication, PDKMonitor_scripts, PDKMonitor_documents, PDKMonitor_layout, PDKMonitor_variants). Each item carries `repoPath` instead of inline bytes; adopters hydrate via the fetch-time helper. Re-publish is idempotent.
